name: Almond Macaroon Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese and 2 tablespoons of butter until softened.
2. Add in 1/4 cup sugar.
3. Stir in 1 egg, 1 tablespoon flour, and coconut flakes.
4. Reserve 16 whole almonds for garnish; chop the remaining almonds.
5. Mix in the chopped almonds set aside.
6. Melt 5 oz chocolate and the remaining butter over low heat until melted.
7. Remove from heat and stir in 1/2 cup sugar and vanilla.
8. Beat in 2 eggs.
9. Incorporate 1/2 cup flour, baking powder, and salt.
10. Add the reserved chopped almonds.
11. Spread the cheese batter evenly on top.
12. Garnish with whole almonds.
13. Bake for 40 minutes until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean; avoid overbaking.
14. Melt any remaining chocolate and drizzle over the brownies.
15. Allow to cool in the pan before cutting into squares.
16. The recipe can be doubled if desired.
